Index.title: Unveil the Secrets of Your Subconscious
Index.subtitle: Discover the hidden meanings of your dreams through advanced AI, Jungian psychology, and deep cultural symbolism.
Index.feature_1_desc: Log the details of your dream, symbols, emotions, and people you saw. The more detail, the better.
Index.feature_2_desc: Our engine processes your dream using psychological frameworks and cultural symbols to extract meaning.
Index.feature_3_desc: Receive a detailed interpretation of what your subconscious might be trying to tell you.

Footer.description: Your AI-powered dream interpretation platform bridging modern psychology with ancient wisdom.

Journal.title: Dream Journal
Journal.subtitle: Record your dreams to unlock their hidden meanings.
Journal.placeholder: Reflect on what you saw, felt, and experienced... (e.g., I was walking through a dense forest and suddenly a silver fox appeared...)
Journal.login_prompt: Please log in to submit and analyze your dreams.
